title: Forestry: Community Edition
description: Forestry bees, trees, and more on modern Minecraft.
body:
Forestry: Community Edition is a port of the classic Forestry mod, expanding nature with new bees, trees, butterflies, farms, and more.

## Notable features
* Bees, trees, and butterflies
* Advanced genetics
* Multiblock farms
* Backpacks
* Mail system
* Renewable energy production

## Credits
thedarkcolour for 1.19.2 port  
Nedelosk, mezz, temp1011, ramidzkh, and more for continued maintenance  
SirSengir for the [original mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/forestry)
